title: All Monetary Policy Statements - Reserve Bank of New Zealand - Te Pūtea Matua
content:
It looks like the browser you're using doesn’t work well with our website. For a better experience, please update to the latest version of Chrome , Edge , Firefox or Safari .

## All Monetary Policy Statements
On this page you can search through all our Monetary Policy Statements

## Monetary Policy Statement May 2026
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 26 May, 2026

## Monetary Policy Statement February 2026
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 17 February, 2026

## Monetary Policy Statement November 2025
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 25 November, 2025

## Monetary Policy Statement August 2025
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 19 August, 2025

## Monetary Policy Statement May 2025
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 27 May, 2025

## Monetary Policy Statement February 2025
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 18 February, 2025

## Monetary Policy Statement November 2024
We explain the reasons behind our OCR decision and provide an overview of what is happening in the economy.
Published date 26 November, 2024

## Monetary Policy Statement August 2024
The Monetary Policy Committee agreed to reduce the Official Cash Rate to 5.25%.
Published date 13 August, 2024

## Monetary Policy Statement May 2024
The Monetary Policy Committee today agreed to keep the Official Cash Rate at 5.50%.
Published date 21 May, 2024

## Monetary Policy Statement February 2024
The Monetary Policy Committee today agreed to hold the Official Cash Rate (OCR) at 5.50%.
Published date 27 February, 2024
There are no results for this date range. Click here to search a new date range
